approval.provider_calls_note: Repository provider-call counter remains 0. The endpoint verification below used a small number of read-only curl/web verification requests by the drafting agent, recorded item by item; no capture is activated.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Data-source contract: exact endpoint, delay definition, update cadence, schema, coverage, terms, and digest (P5.1 style)
prerequisite_alignment.note: All seven elements enumerated as pre-activation requirements; candidate table records exact endpoints with per-candidate verification status.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Runtime boundary amendment: delay label propagation into UI and read model so delayed data is never presented as current; cutoff and available_at semantics consistent with the P5.2 point-in-time convention
prerequisite_alignment.note: Delay label is part of the data; available_at <= as_of PIT; staleness threshold and cutoff defined as amendment requirements.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Test and evidence: same evidence chain as realtime (raw caller-owned, normalized repository-owned, offline replay, work-unit digest approval)
prerequisite_alignment.note: Trial capture with caller-owned raw evidence, deterministic normalization, offline P1-P4 replay, acceptance JSON with provider_calls accounted per approved request.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Approval independent of realtime; own contract digest and amendment
prerequisite_alignment.note: Capability 1 stays deferred_not_approved; a feed fresher than its contractual delay is realtime-class and out of this contract's scope.

prerequisite_alignment.prerequisite: Risk handling: delayed licence terms differ from EOD bulk; delayed quotes must not feed anything resembling an order decision surface
prerequisite_alignment.note: Independent licence review required; research-only boundary and P4 audit invariants enforced; cannot-claim records both.

delay_definition_anchor.finding: TWSE 交易資訊使用管理辦法: 延遲資訊 is transaction information delayed twenty minutes or more relative to realtime; located 2026-07-22 via web search.

candidates.verification: HTTP 200 JSON via read-only curl on 2026-07-22 (2 requests). Observed fields: o/h/l/z (open/high/low/last), y (previous close), v (volume), d/t (quote date/time), a/b/f/g (five-level book), userDelay field present. Exact delay and per-field freshness semantics NOT proven; must be established by first human trial capture during market hours.
Fetched 2026-07-22: 143 paths; no delayed-quote endpoint exists. exchangeReport/MI_INDEX20 is the daily top-20-by-volume report, not a delay feed.
HTTP 404 on 2026-07-22 (2 requests); legacy endpoint retired, recorded to prevent resurrection.
Already assessed in workflow/tqe-p5-twse-source-contract.json option_c_endpoint_assessment with trial capture; post-close snapshot only, no intraday freshness.
Located via web search 2026-07-22: licensing/product page for TPEx delayed information; no free public endpoint; not admitted.

acceptance_notes: Capability 2 contract is drafted per the 2026-07-22 approval order 3 -> 5 -> 2; capabilities 3 and 5 are implemented and human-accepted.

Feed capture is defined as human-initiated bounded capture (P5.1 option C pattern): exact endpoint, request budget, per-run digest; not a persistent connection, not streaming, not an unattended poller.
Delay labelling is mandatory end-to-end: delayed data must never be presented as current, and the label must survive into any consumer surface (alerts, valuation).

The primary candidate endpoint (twse_mis_getstockinfo) is verified reachable with an observed schema, but its delay semantics are unproven; the contract makes trial-capture proof a pre-activation requirement and treats a fresher-than-labelled feed as realtime-class, out of scope.
Automatic order placement remains prohibited; no order route, command, UI control, or order-decision surface is created or authorized.
This evidence records a contract and a work-unit draft only; no feed functionality is implemented and no capture is activated. Capabilities 1, 4, and 6 remain deferred_not_approved.
The approved P4 boundary is unchanged and p4_research_closure.py passes.
